text: A small street parade features a man in an elephant costume.
A microwave sitting outside next to a garbage can.
An open refrigerator that contains beer, juice and vegetables.
Woman in a chair outside using a laptop
A boy takes a picture of a herd of sheep.
Man sitting on a large ambulance motorcycle on the street.
A cow is on the side of a road as a woman in a car holds up her black dog to the window.
A stack of suitcases sitting on a green chair.
A child sitting on a fire hydrant by the road.
A bed and a table in a room.
